title: Russian Oil Shipment Puts Focus on Kremlin Spy Outpost in Cuba
summary_full: Moscow may be challenging President Trump’s effort to choke Cuba’s economy. China also has suspected listening posts on the island.
summary_public: Moscow may be challenging President Trump’s effort to choke Cuba’s economy. China also has suspected listening posts on the island.
